'''dazudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jilbab|jilbab]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-z-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jilbab|jilbab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dazudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæzidith|dæzidith]] || [[word:dæzidij|dæzidij]] || [[word:dæzidish|dæzidish]] || [[word:dæzidi|dæzidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dazuzuduth|dazuzuduth]] || [[word:dazuzuduj|dazuzuduj]] || [[word:dazuzudush|dazuzudush]] || [[word:dazuzudu|dazuzudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dazuduth|dazuduth]] || [[word:dazuduj|dazuduj]] || [[word:dazudush|dazudush]] || [[word:dazudu|dazudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dazufduth|dazufduth]] || [[word:dazufduj|dazufduj]] || [[word:dazufdush|dazufdush]] || [[word:dazufduf|dazufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dazuduthu|dazuduthu]] || [[word:dazuduju|dazuduju]] || [[word:dazudushu|dazudushu]] || [[word:dazuduku|dazuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dazuduth|dazuduth]] || [[word:dazuduj|dazuduj]] || [[word:dazudush|dazudush]] || [[word:dazudu|dazudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dazuduthul|dazuduthul]] || [[word:dazudujul|dazudujul]] || [[word:dazudushul|dazudushul]] || [[word:dazudukul|dazudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dazuduthuthu|dazuduthuthu]] || [[word:dazudujuju|dazudujuju]] || [[word:dazudushushu|dazudushushu]] || [[word:dazuduku|dazuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dazuduthun|dazuduthun]] || [[word:dazudujun|dazudujun]] || [[word:dazudushun|dazudushun]] || [[word:dazudukun|dazudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dazuduthuoro|dazuduthuoro]] || [[word:dazudujuoro|dazudujuoro]] || [[word:dazudushuoro|dazudushuoro]] || [[word:dazudukuoro|dazudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
